CustomField.formula: "http://maps.google.com/maps?f=q&hl=en&q=" + SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( Name , " ", "%20") ,"&","%26"),"@","%40") + "+" + SUBSTITUTE(HOMEtracker__City__c," ", "%20") + "+" + SUBSTITUTE(HOMEtracker__State__c," ", "%20") + "+" + HOMEtracker__Postal_Code__c + "+&btnG=Search"
CustomField.label: Property Map
